rationale: Intermittent CI test failure in replica set refresh test; flaky test, no spec behavior deviation.
API ergonomics improvement to index creation interface syntax; no spec behavior involved.
Performance profiling improvement task; no spec behavior involved.
Regression in seed list management after reconnect; internal state management bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Sporadic GridFS test failure due to chunks ordering; flaky test infrastructure issue, not a spec violation.
Code style improvement to use safe mode in examples; no spec behavior involved.
Low-priority internal work to wrap C driver; implementation detail, no spec behavior.
Feature request to support custom Hash class for BSON deserialization; not a spec violation, API enhancement.
Regression: no reconnection on write after ConnectionFailure; internal reconnect logic bug, no specific spec rule named.
Intermittent test failure in replica set secondary detection; flaky test, no spec behavior deviation.
findAndModify sent to secondary despite read preference; server selection spec requires write operations go to primary.
User confusion about Ruby block syntax; not a driver bug or spec violation.
Logic bug in PoolManager#refresh creating excess socket pools; internal connection pool implementation bug.
readPreference URI option not supported despite connection string spec requiring it.
MongoShardedClient fails on :secondary and :primary_preferred read preferences; server selection spec requires these modes work.
Pool checkout not cleaning stale thread-local socket associations; internal connection pool implementation bug.
MongoShardedClient URI parsing bugs (type error on multi-host ENV string); implementation bug, not a named spec rule violation.
Deadlock risk in Pool#checkin using signal vs broadcast; internal threading implementation bug, not a spec violation.
bson_ext gem fails to compile on Ruby 2.0-rc2; build/packaging issue.
JRuby BSON extension runtime cache is not thread-safe; internal implementation bug, not a BSON spec rule violation.
batch_size not applied to initial query, only to getMore; cursor protocol spec requires batchSize on initial OP_QUERY.
OP_KILL_CURSORS sent to wrong member; cursors must be killed on the server that owns them per wire protocol spec.
bson_ext C extension not activated after bundler/Ruby upgrade; build/packaging/gem loading issue.
GETMORE sent to wrong server after intervening query unpins connection; cursor must be exhausted on originating server.
bson_ext fails to install on Linux with Ruby 2.0; build/packaging issue.
Should throw exception when multiple credentials used for same DB per auth spec; driver silently replaces credentials instead.
BSON document size limit using hardcoded 4MB instead of server-reported max; internal bug, unclear which specific spec rule violated.
Changing read preference should unpin read pool; depends on DRIVERS-21 indicating server selection spec requirement.
Performance issue: drop collection causes full namespace scan; no spec violation involved.
Compiler warning when building C extension under Ruby 2.0; build issue, not a spec violation.
readPreference URI option parsed but not applied; connection string spec requires the option to affect query routing.
BSON::OrderedHash#clone has different deep/shallow semantics between Ruby 1.8 and 1.9; Ruby version compat issue, not a BSON spec violation.
Documentation typo: missing closing bracket in code samples; docs bug, no spec behavior.
DB#authenticate regression after read preference refactor (Symbol vs Hash type error); internal implementation regression.
MongoShardedClient does not reconnect when current mongos is down; reconnection behavior implementation bug without named spec rule.
Regression: create command wrapped in $query wrapper after refactor; internal wire protocol serialization bug from 1.8.4.
BSON document size check uses hardcoded 4MB limit instead of server max; internal sizing bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Sporadic test failure in DBAPITest#test_array; no description, insufficient detail.
Broken connection state after Timeout interrupts socket checkin; internal threading/pool deadlock, not a spec violation.
DBRef not supported in JRuby extension; internal implementation inconsistency between Ruby runtimes, not a spec violation.
Unit test errors in MongoShardedClient tests; test infrastructure bug in the driver's own unit tests.
Feature request: add strict JSON support for BSON; new feature, not a spec nonconformance.
Tailable cursor returns REPLY_CURSOR_NOT_FOUND; user suspects server issue, no specific spec rule cited.
Regression: thread_local[:managers] not re-set after close/reconnect; internal state management bug.
ShardingPoolManager#check_connection_health doesn't support authentication; internal implementation gap silently swallowed by rescue.
:nearest read preference raises NameError; server selection spec requires nearest mode select closest member across all members.
Thread safety bug: concurrent hash mutation during iteration in PoolManager#connect_to_members; internal concurrency bug.
CI setup for auth tests; test infrastructure/CI work, no spec behavior involved.
Use-after-free in BSON C extension error path; memory safety bug in C code, not a spec violation.
Null dereference before null check in BSON C extension buffer allocation; memory safety bug, not a spec violation.
